title: PvP Bot Formation Addon
description:
PVP Bot Formation

PVP Bot Formation is an addon for PVP Bot v0.0.13A that adds automatic grid formation controls for bot groups.
body:
PVP Bot Formation  

PVP Bot Formation is an addon for PVP Bot v0.0.13A that adds automatic grid formation controls for bot groups.  

It lets you arrange PvP bots into clean, evenly spaced battle formations for SMP wars, bridge standoffs, scripted fights, machinima, trailers, and large-scale event scenes. Instead of bots spawning in a messy cluster, they are placed into organized rows that look deliberate and cinematic.  

Features  
Automatic grid formations for PvP bots  
Dynamic layout scaling for any bot count up to 50  
Even spacing between bots for cleaner visuals  
Left-to-right row placement  
Centered final rows for more balanced formations  
Faction-based formation support  
Mass-spawn formation support  
Optional group support for pvpbot-groups (currently unpublished)  
Commands  
/pvpbot massspawn <count> grid  
Spawns bots and places them into a grid formation as they come online.  
/pvpbot faction <faction> formation grid  
Arranges all active bots in a faction into a grid around the player.  
/pvpbot faction group <group> formation grid  
Arranges all active bots in a group into a grid. This requires pvpbot-groups (currently unpublished).  
Why download this addon?  

This mod is made for players and creators who want their bot battles to look structured instead of chaotic. It is especially useful for:  

SMP war events  
Cinematic Minecraft battles  
Scripted combat scenes  
Trailer and machinima shots  
Large bot armies and organized PvP showcases  
Compatibility  
Minecraft 1.21+  
Fabric Loader  
Fabric API  
Requires PVP Bot v0.0.13A  
Also requires any dependencies required by PVP Bot v0.0.13A  
Optional support for pvpbot-groups (currently unpublished)  
Current status  

This project is in early development, so features and behavior may change in future updates.
